papers.title: Early life blood pressure and cognitive function in mid/late life: A synthetic longitudinal cohort analysis
papers.translated_title: 早期生命血压与中晚年认知功能：一项合成纵向队列分析
papers.author: Bustillo, A. J.
papers.summary: BACKGROUND. Hypertension is a well-studied dementia risk factor. The effects of hypertension on cognitive aging may vary by life stage, yet most prior studies have focused on mid- or late-life blood pressure. This gap reflects the lack of longitudinal cohorts spanning both childhood blood pressure measurements and later-life cognitive assessments. To address this gap, we examined the association between early-life blood pressure and mid/late-life cognition using a synthetic cohort approach. METHODS. Using data fusion as a guiding framework, we pooled the Bogalusa Heart Study (BHS), which provides early-life blood pressure data (ages 4-16), with the CARDIA study, which provides mid/late-life cognitive data (ages 58-70), to create a synthetic longitudinal cohort. The cohorts overlapped between ages 17-57. Cognition comprised raw and z-scores measures of executive function, memory, and processing speed. Early life systolic blood pressure (SBP) was defined as a time-weighted average of SBP measurements between ages 4 and 16. We pooled data by exact- and distance-matching 10 BHS participants to each CARDIA participant on hypothesized mediators & confounders of the early life SBP and cognition relationship that overlapped in age of measurement between the two cohorts, including sociodemographics and ~midlife measures of blood pressure, cognition, and vascular risk factors. Confounder-adjusted random intercept models were used to estimate the association between early-life SBP and cognitive outcomes. RESULTS. There was no significant association between early life SBP and mid/late-life cognitive raw scores: executive function [{beta} (95% CI) = 0.285 (-0.867, 1.437)], memory [-0.019 (-0.308, 0.269)], or processing speed [-0.188 (-1.611, 1.236]. Likewise, no associations were observed when using Z-scored cognitive outcomes. CONCLUSIONS. We observed no evidence that early life SBP was associated with mid/late-life cognition, although interpretation of these findings depends on strong assumptions about cohort comparability and linkage validity that underpin the synthetic cohort approach. While our results lacked precision, we demonstrate a possible signal in the expected direction (i.e., greater systolic blood pressure results in worse cognitive functioning across all domains) that could be the focus of future work.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：高血压是已被充分研究的痴呆风险因素。高血压对认知老化的影响可能因生命阶段而异，但既往研究多聚焦于中年或晚年血压。这一空白源于缺乏同时涵盖儿童期血压测量与晚年认知评估的纵向队列。为填补该空白，我们采用合成队列方法，探究早期血压与中晚年认知的关联。方法：以数据融合为指导框架，我们将提供早期血压数据（4-16岁）的博加卢萨心脏研究（BHS）与提供中晚年认知数据（58-70岁）的CARDIA研究合并，构建合成纵向队列。两队列在17-57岁年龄段存在重叠。认知评估包括执行功能、记忆力和处理速度的原始分与Z分数。早期收缩压（SBP）定义为4-16岁期间SBP测量的时间加权平均值。通过精确匹配与距离匹配法，以10名BHS参与者匹配1名CARDIA参与者，匹配变量为两队列测量年龄重叠的早期SBP与认知关系中的假设中介变量与混杂因素，包括社会人口学特征及中年期血压、认知与血管风险因素测量值。采用混杂因素调整的随机截距模型评估早期SBP与认知结局的关联。结果：早期SBP与中晚年认知原始分无显著关联：执行功能[β（95% CI）= 0.285（-0.867, 1.437）]、记忆力[-0.019（-0.308, 0.269）]、处理速度[-0.188（-1.611, 1.236）]。采用Z分数认知结局时亦未观察到关联。结论：未发现早期SBP与中晚年认知存在关联的证据，但该结论的解读依赖于合成队列方法中关于队列可比性与链接有效性的强假设。尽管结果缺乏精确性，我们观察到预期方向的潜在信号（即收缩压升高导致所有认知领域功能下降），这或可成为未来研究的重点。

papers.title: Cohort profile: the Cohort for Risk Prediction Model Evaluation (CORE) for external validation of models identifying high-risk pregnant women in the early second trimester.
papers.translated_title: 队列概况：用于早期妊娠中期高风险孕妇模型外部验证的风险预测模型评估队列（CORE）
papers.author: Jain, R. s.
papers.summary: Purpose: The Cohort for Risk Prediction Model Evaluation (CORE) was established to externally validate prediction models that identify high-risk pregnancies in the early second trimester. Such models are often developed on small, single-source datasets and seldom tested elsewhere. Recent evidence shows that only about 6-10% models are ever externally validated which raises concerns about whether they perform reliably in new and diverse populations. In the maternal perinatal space, CORE addresses this gap by providing an Indian second-trimester cohort with harmonised imaging and outcome data on which existing risk prediction models can be validated. Participants. CORE includes 964 pregnant women aged over 18 years, enrolled at the Hamdard Institute of Medical Sciences and Research (HIMSR), New Delhi, between August 2021 and March 2023. Women were recruited before 20 weeks of gestation and followed up at 18-22 weeks for an ultrasound scan and at delivery. At all time points, a structured set of sociodemographic, clinical, and obstetric data was captured, together with ultrasound images at 18-20 weeks from which fetal biometry and cervical length were measured. Findings to date: The median maternal age was 27.6 years; 51% had a normal body-mass index (BMI) and 30% were overweight. There were almost equal number of Nulliparous (480, 50%) and multiparous (484, 50%). About 41% prevalence of history of prior preterm in multiparous women. Outcomes were available for 750 participants (23 abortions, 3 stillbirths, 724 singleton live births). Among the 724 live births, 80/724 (11%) were preterm, 190/716 (26.5%) were small for gestational age (SGA) and 40/716 (5.6%) were large for gestational age (LGA) by INTERGROWTH-21st standards and 260/716 (35.6%) of newborns were categorized into small vulnerable newborn (SVN). Future plans. CORE will be used to externally validate and, in aggregate with similar cohorts, help improve risk-prediction models for pregnant women in India and comparable settings. We invite collaborators to use this resource; clinical and imaging data are available under a controlled-access model on reasonable request. Strengths and limitations of this study Prospective cohort with data-collection and ultrasound protocols harmonised with the GARBH-Ini and AMANHI cohorts, enabling like-for-like pooled and cross-cohort analyses. A two-tier ultrasound quality-assurance process, with retention of both clean (unannotated) and caliper-annotated images, supports validation of image-based prediction models. Sample size informed by precision-based guidance for the external validation of prediction models, providing adequate power to assess model discrimination for the principal outcomes. Single-site, hospital-based recruitment from a limited geographical catchment, which constrains direct generalisability and makes the cohort most valuable when pooled with comparable cohorts. No continuous follow-up between 20 weeks of gestation and delivery, limiting the assessment of temporal change and longer-term outcomes.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：风险预测模型评估队列（CORE）旨在通过外部验证识别孕早期高危妊娠的预测模型。这类模型通常基于小规模单源数据集开发，且很少在其他人群中进行测试。最新证据显示，仅约6-10%的模型曾接受外部验证，这引发了对模型在新异人群中可靠性的担忧。在围产期领域，CORE通过提供印度孕中期队列数据填补这一空白，该队列包含标准化影像与结局数据，可用于验证现有风险预测模型。参与者：CORE纳入964名年龄超过18岁的孕妇，于2021年8月至2023年3月期间在新德里哈姆达德医学科学研究所（HIMSR）入组。孕妇在孕20周前完成招募，并在孕18-22周接受超声检查及分娩时随访。所有时间点均采集结构化社会人口学、临床及产科数据，同时获取孕18-20周超声图像用于测量胎儿生物测量参数和宫颈长度。当前发现：孕妇中位年龄27.6岁；51%体重指数（BMI）正常，30%超重。初产妇（480例，50%）与经产妇（484例，50%）比例相近。经产妇中既往早产史患病率约41%。750名参与者获得结局数据（23例流产、3例死产、724例单胎活产）。在724例活产中，80/724（11%）为早产，190/716（26.5%）为小于胎龄儿（SGA），40/716（5.6%）为大于胎龄儿（LGA）（依据INTERGROWTH-21st标准），260/716（35.6%）新生儿被归类为小型脆弱新生儿（SVN）。未来计划：CORE将用于外部验证，并与类似队列联合分析，以改进印度及相似环境下孕妇的风险预测模型。我们诚邀合作者使用该资源；临床与影像数据在合理请求下可通过受控访问模式获取。研究优势与局限性：前瞻性队列，数据采集与超声方案与GARBH-Ini和AMANHI队列标准化，支持同类合并及跨队列分析。双层超声质量保证流程保留原始（无标注）及卡尺标注图像，支持基于图像的预测模型验证。样本量基于预测模型外部验证的精度指导原则计算，为评估主要结局的模型区分度提供充分统计效力。单中心医院招募且地理覆盖范围有限，限制直接推广性，需与同类队列合并分析才能发挥最大价值。孕20周至分娩期间无连续随访，限制了对时间变化及远期结局的评估。

papers.title: Geographic variation in delays for endoscopy and imaging in England since COVID: analysis of monthly diagnostics data
papers.translated_title: 自新冠疫情以来，英格兰内窥镜和影像检查延迟的地理差异：基于月度诊断数据的分析
papers.author: White, B.
papers.summary: Aims Diagnostic testing delays in England worsened during the COVID-19 pandemic, but it is unclear how quickly waiting times are recovering, and whether the speed of recovery varies locally. We aimed to: (1) ascertain whether imaging and endoscopy delays improved since the pandemic and in the past year; (2) quantify variation between local areas (sub-Integrated Care Boards) in delays (accounting for that expected by chance), and whether variation widened or narrowed in the past year; and (3) ascertain whether current trends in delays differ between local areas. Methods We analysed publicly available monthly data from NHS England on the proportion of patients waiting 6 weeks or longer for eight diagnostic tests (four imaging and four endoscopy) across 103 local areas in England from January 2019 to April 2026. Trends over time were described. To assess recent changes, we compared proportions waiting 6+ weeks in April 2026 with April 2025 using mixed-effects binomial logistic regression, with random intercepts and slopes for local areas. Geographic variation beyond chance, and change in variation in the past year was quantified using modelled random effect variances. This was translated into 25th to 75th percentile values to give the middle 50% distribution of local areas. Local area-specific trends were examined using modelled conditional estimates. Findings Although the proportion of patients waiting 6 weeks or longer for imaging and endoscopy tests has partially reduced since the pandemic, this appears to have stalled in the past year and even increased for gastro-intestinal endoscopies and MRI. From April 2025 to April 2026, delays increased significantly for gastroscopy (22% to 30%; p < 0.001), colonoscopy (25% to 30%; p = 0.002), flexible sigmoidoscopy (27% to 33%; p < 0.001), and MRI (15% to 25%; p < 0.001), without significant improvement for other tests. There was substantial geographic variation beyond chance, with between three- to five-fold differences between the middle 50% of local areas (i.e. 25th to 75th percentiles). The magnitude of geographic variation was persistent in the past year, and significantly increased for MRI. Individual local areas experienced markedly different changes since April 2025, including over a 50% reduction in delays in some areas and doubling in others. Conclusions Diagnostic testing delays in England have not returned to pre-pandemic levels, and recent progress has stalled or reversed for key endoscopy services. Substantial and persistent geographic variation remains, with divergent local trends. Policy responses should prioritise both reducing overall waiting times and addressing underlying drivers of local volatility in diagnostic capacity, demand, and service organisation.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：新冠疫情期间，英格兰诊断检测延误问题加剧，但目前尚不清楚等待时间恢复速度如何，以及恢复速度是否存在地区差异。本研究旨在：（1）明确影像和内镜检查的延误情况自疫情以来及过去一年是否有所改善；（2）量化各地区（次级综合护理委员会）之间延误的差异（排除随机因素），并评估过去一年差异是否扩大或缩小；（3）判断当前各地区延误趋势是否存在差异。方法：我们分析了英格兰国家医疗服务体系（NHS England）2019年1月至2026年4月期间103个地区的公开月度数据，涵盖八项诊断检测（四项影像、四项内镜）中等待6周及以上的患者比例。描述时间趋势，并通过混合效应二项逻辑回归（含地区随机截距和斜率）比较2026年4月与2025年4月等待6周以上比例的变化。利用模型随机效应方差量化超出随机因素的地理差异及其年度变化，并将结果转换为第25至第75百分位值，以呈现中间50%地区的分布。通过模型条件估计分析各地区特定趋势。结果：尽管疫情后影像和内镜检测等待6周及以上的患者比例部分下降，但过去一年这一改善似乎停滞，甚至胃肠道内镜和磁共振成像（MRI）的延误有所增加。2025年4月至2026年4月，胃镜（22%升至30%；p < 0.001）、结肠镜（25%升至30%；p = 0.002）、可屈性乙状结肠镜（27%升至33%；p < 0.001）和MRI（15%升至25%；p < 0.001）的延误显著增加，其他检测无显著改善。地区间存在超出随机因素的显著地理差异，中间50%地区（即第25至第75百分位）的差异达3至5倍。过去一年地理差异幅度持续存在，且MRI的差异显著扩大。自2025年4月以来，各地区变化差异显著，部分地区延误减少超过50%，而其他地区则翻倍。结论：英格兰诊断检测延误尚未恢复至疫情前水平，关键内镜服务的近期改善已停滞或逆转。地区间存在显著且持续的地理差异，且地方趋势分化。政策应对应优先考虑减少总体等待时间，并解决诊断能力、需求及服务组织方面导致地方波动的根本驱动因素。

papers.title: Poor sleep is robustly correlated with accelerated aging but the evidence for causation is mixed
papers.translated_title: 睡眠质量差与加速衰老之间存在显著相关性，但因果关系的证据尚不明确。
papers.author: Whitman, E. T.
papers.summary: Sleep gets worse with age and is correlated with risk for disease and mortality. The possibility that poor sleep causes aging to accelerate has prompted interest in improving sleep to slow aging and prevent disease. However, the existing evidence on the link between poor sleep and accelerated aging is unclear. Here, we tested for correlation and causation between poor sleep and accelerated aging using five independent datasets of adults (total N > 64,000). We found strong evidence for a correlation between poor sleep and fast aging that is consistent across young, middle, and late adulthood and across aging biomarkers derived from different tissues and modalities. We found that this correlation is robust to the influence of chronic disease burden, but not to the influence of shared genetic and early environmental factors among twins. Finally, we found mixed evidence for a causal influence of poor sleep on accelerated aging using Mendelian randomization. Our findings indicate that the correlation between poor sleep and accelerated aging is highly robust; however, the claim that poor sleep causes aging to accelerate is not consistently supported.
papers.translated_summary: 睡眠质量随年龄增长而下降，并与疾病风险和死亡率相关。睡眠不佳导致衰老加速的可能性，促使人们关注通过改善睡眠来延缓衰老和预防疾病。然而，关于睡眠不佳与加速衰老之间联系的现有证据尚不明确。本研究利用五个独立成人数据集（总样本量超过64,000人），检验了睡眠不佳与加速衰老之间的相关性和因果关系。我们发现强有力的证据表明，睡眠不佳与快速衰老之间存在相关性，这种相关性在青年、中年和晚年阶段以及源自不同组织和模态的衰老生物标志物中均保持一致。我们还发现，这种相关性不受慢性疾病负担的影响，但受双胞胎间共享遗传和早期环境因素的影响。最后，通过孟德尔随机化分析，我们发现了睡眠不佳对加速衰老存在因果影响的不一致证据。研究结果表明，睡眠不佳与加速衰老之间的相关性非常稳定，但睡眠不佳导致衰老加速的论断并未得到一致支持。

papers.title: Global COVID-19 vaccination uptake across the emergency and early post-emergency periods, 2021-2024
papers.translated_title: 2021-2024年全球新冠疫苗在紧急及早期后紧急阶段的接种情况
papers.author: Brooks, D. J.
papers.summary: COVID-19 vaccination helped change the course of the pandemic and remains critical for protecting high-risk groups. We analyzed data submitted to WHO to describe COVID-19 vaccination coverage during the emergency period from 2021-2023 and annual uptake in 2024, the first post-emergency calendar year after the Public Health Emergency of International Concern designation was lifted. By end-2023, global complete primary series coverage reached 65% in the total population, 82% among older adults, and 91% among health and care workers (HCWs), across reporting countries. Booster coverage was lower, at 33%, 60%, and 69%, respectively. Across indicators, disparities by country income group and region emerged early and persisted through 2024. In 2024, vaccination of older adults and HCWs was limited and heterogeneous. These findings underscore the need for stronger, sustainably financed adult immunization platforms and associated monitoring systems to enhance life-course vaccination benefits and to support future outbreak, epidemic, and pandemic responses.
papers.translated_summary: COVID-19疫苗接种帮助改变了疫情进程，且对于保护高风险群体仍至关重要。我们分析了2021-2023年紧急时期向WHO提交的疫苗接种覆盖率数据，以及2024年（国际关注的突发公共卫生事件解除后的首个非紧急日历年度）的年度接种情况。截至2023年底，报告国家中全球完整基础免疫系列覆盖率在总人口中达65%，老年人中达82%，卫生保健工作者中达91%。加强针覆盖率较低，分别为33%、60%和69%。各项指标显示，按国家收入组别和区域划分的差异在早期就已显现，并持续至2024年。2024年，老年人和卫生保健工作者的疫苗接种有限且不均衡。这些发现凸显了建立更强有力、可持续资助的成人免疫平台及相关监测系统的必要性，以增强全生命周期疫苗接种效益，并支持未来疫情、流行病和大流行的应对工作。

papers.title: COVID-19 mRNA Vaccination Reduces Guillain-Barre Syndrome Risk: Evidence from a Large Longitudinal Cohort Study
papers.translated_title: COVID-19 mRNA疫苗接种降低吉兰-巴雷综合征风险：来自大型纵向队列研究的证据
papers.author: Li, J.
papers.summary: Abstract The association between COVID-19 vaccination and Guillain-Barre syndrome (GBS) has been previously investigated with inconsistent results, largely due to limited data and lack of concurrent controls. To address this problem, a large longitudinal cohort study was conducted using National COVID Cohort Collaborative (N3C) data. While COVID-19 infection was associated with increased GBS occurrence, COVID-19 vaccination was associated with significantly reduced GBS risk relative to unexposed (unvaccinated and uninfected) control, corresponding to a 61% lower 30-day risk (incidence risk ratio: IRR = 0.39, P < 0.01), consistent with multivariable Cox regression showing a similar reduction (adjusted hazard ratio: aHR = 0.41, P < 0.01). This protective association was observed only among recipients of mRNA vaccines (BNT162b2: IRR = 0.38, P < 0.01; mRNA-1273: IRR = 0.24, P < 0.01), but not among recipients of adenoviral-vector vaccines (IRR = 1.38, P > 0.05). Prior COVID-19 vaccination also reduced infection-associated GBS risk. Additional factors associated with GBS risk included sex, vaccine dose, and pre-existing comorbidities such as stroke, neurological disorders, and autoimmune diseases. Overall, our N3C large-scale study provides evidence that COVID-19 mRNA vaccination reduces GBS risk, supporting the safety profile of mRNA vaccines and warranting further mechanistic investigation.
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 此前关于COVID-19疫苗接种与吉兰-巴雷综合征（GBS）关联的研究结果不一致，主要受限于数据不足和缺乏同期对照组。为解决这一问题，本研究利用国家COVID队列协作组（N3C）数据开展了一项大规模纵向队列研究。结果显示，COVID-19感染与GBS发生率升高相关，而相对于未暴露（未接种疫苗且未感染）对照组，COVID-19疫苗接种与GBS风险显著降低相关，30天风险降低61%（发病率风险比：IRR = 0.39，P < 0.01），多变量Cox回归分析也证实了类似的风险降低（调整后风险比：aHR = 0.41，P < 0.01）。这种保护性关联仅见于mRNA疫苗接种者（BNT162b2：IRR = 0.38，P < 0.01；mRNA-1273：IRR = 0.24，P < 0.01），而腺病毒载体疫苗接种者未观察到该关联（IRR = 1.38，P > 0.05）。既往COVID-19疫苗接种还可降低感染相关的GBS风险。与GBS风险相关的其他因素包括性别、疫苗剂量以及卒中、神经系统疾病和自身免疫性疾病等既往合并症。总体而言，本项基于N3C的大规模研究提供了COVID-19 mRNA疫苗接种可降低GBS风险的证据，支持mRNA疫苗的安全性特征，并有必要开展进一步机制研究。

papers.title: Effect of Intensive vs Standard Blood Pressure Control According to APOE ε4 Genotype: A Secondary Analysis of SPRINT
papers.translated_title: 根据APOE ε4基因型进行强化与标准血压控制的效果：SPRINT试验的二次分析
papers.author: Xu, Y.
papers.summary: Importance: Apolipoprotein E (APOE) {varepsilon}4 is the strongest genetic risk factor for sporadic dementia, yet whether the benefits of intensive systolic blood pressure (SBP) control differ by APOE {varepsilon}4 carrier status remains unknown. This is among the first randomized evaluations of intensive SBP control on all-cause dementia by APOE {varepsilon}4 status in US adults without diabetes. Objective: To compare effects of intensive vs standard SBP control on incident all-cause probable dementia between APOE {varepsilon}4 carriers and non-carriers. Design, Setting, and Participants: Secondary analysis of the Systolic Blood Pressure Intervention Trial (SPRINT), a multicenter randomized trial of adults [≥]50 years with hypertension and increased cardiovascular risk, but without diabetes, prior stroke, or dementia. Primary cognitive follow-up ended July 2018. Participants were further followed with telephone-based outcome assessment from 2019 through 2023. Interventions: Intensive SBP control (goal <120 mm Hg) vs standard SBP control (goal <140 mm Hg). Main Outcomes and Measures: The primary outcome was all-cause probable dementia. Secondary outcomes were mild cognitive impairment (MCI); MCI or dementia; MCI, dementia, or death; and all-cause mortality. APOE {varepsilon}4 status was the primary effect modifier. Results: Of 9,361 randomized participants, 8,390 (89.6%) had APOE genotyping (29% {varepsilon}4 carriers); 7,733 (82.6%) had both genotype and outcome data (mean age, 68 years; 36% female; 28% Non-Hispanic Black). Over a median follow-up of 5.1 years, dementia rates (intensive vs standard) were 9.7 vs 13.2 per 1,000 person-years among {varepsilon}4 carriers (hazard ratio [HR], 0.73; 95% CI, 0.51-1.04) and 6.1 vs 6.7 among non-carriers (HR, 0.91; 95% CI, 0.67-1.23; P-interaction = .35). Four-year risk differences were -1.7% (95% CI, -3.4% to 0%; number needed to treat, 59) among carriers and 0.2% (95% CI, -0.6% to 1%) among non-carriers (P-interaction = .045). Patterns were similar for the composite of MCI or dementia; effects on MCI were similar between APOE {varepsilon}4 subgroups. Conclusions and Relevance: Among US adults at high cardiovascular risk, intensive SBP control yielded larger absolute risk reduction in dementia among APOE {varepsilon}4 carriers than non-carriers; relative effects were similar. These findings may inform APOE {varepsilon}4-stratified blood pressure management for dementia prevention.
papers.translated_summary: 重要性：载脂蛋白E（APOE）ε4是散发性痴呆最强的遗传风险因子，但强化收缩压（SBP）控制的获益是否因APOE ε4携带状态而异仍未知。这是美国无糖尿病成人中首个按APOE ε4状态评估强化SBP控制对全因痴呆影响的随机研究。目的：比较APOE ε4携带者与非携带者中强化SBP控制与标准SBP控制对偶发性全因可能痴呆的影响。设计、背景与参与者：对收缩压干预试验（SPRINT）的二次分析，该试验为多中心随机试验，纳入≥50岁高血压且心血管风险增加但无糖尿病、既往卒中或痴呆的成人。主要认知随访于2018年7月结束。参与者于2019年至2023年通过电话结局评估继续随访。干预措施：强化SBP控制（目标<120 mmHg）与标准SBP控制（目标<140 mmHg）。主要结局与测量指标：主要结局为全因可能痴呆。次要结局为轻度认知障碍（MCI）；MCI或痴呆；MCI、痴呆或死亡；以及全因死亡率。APOE ε4状态为主要效应修饰因子。结果：在9361名随机参与者中，8390人（89.6%）进行了APOE基因分型（29%为ε4携带者）；7733人（82.6%）同时具有基因型和结局数据（平均年龄68岁；36%为女性；28%为非西班牙裔黑人）。中位随访5.1年期间，ε4携带者中痴呆发生率（强化组 vs 标准组）为每1000人年9.7 vs 13.2（风险比[HR] 0.73；95% CI 0.51-1.04），非携带者为6.1 vs 6.7（HR 0.91；95% CI 0.67-1.23；交互作用P=0.35）。四年风险差异在携带者为-1.7%（95% CI -3.4%至0%；需治疗人数59），非携带者为0.2%（95% CI -0.6%至1%）（交互作用P=0.045）。MCI或痴呆复合结局模式相似；APOE ε4亚组间MCI效应类似。结论与相关性：在高心血管风险的美国成人中，强化SBP控制在APOE ε4携带者中比非携带者产生更大的痴呆绝对风险降低；相对效应相似。这些发现可为基于APOE ε4分层的痴呆预防血压管理提供依据。

papers.title: Automated Multisource Electronic Frailty Index in Acute Ischemic Stroke: Development and Clinical Utility
papers.translated_title: 急性缺血性卒中中的自动化多源电子衰弱指数：开发与临床实用性
papers.author: Lin, S.
papers.summary: Background: Frailty is common in acute ischemic stroke (AIS) and predicts poor outcomes, but is not routinely captured in acute stroke care. Manual frailty tools are difficult to apply consistently in busy inpatient settings, while existing electronic frailty indices (eFIs) often rely on limited data modalities. We developed a scalable pre-stroke electronic frailty index (eFI) using multisource electronic medical record (EMR) data and evaluated its clinical utility. Methods: We conducted a retrospective cohort study of AIS admissions to Singapore General Hospital from July 1, 2024, to January 31, 2025. A fully automated pipeline derived an eFI from EMR data over a 3-year lookback period, incorporating ICD-10 codes, vital signs, anthropometry, laboratory results, medications, and free-text documentation processed using artificial intelligence?augmented extraction of predefined, clinically interpretable deficits. Candidate variables were screened using a validated 10-step frailty index framework and refined by multidisciplinary expert consensus. Results: Among 501 AIS cases, the pipeline generated 75 candidate variables and a final 33-variable eFI, with scores derived for 492 cases (98.2%). Frail patients had greater premorbid disability, higher stroke severity, longer hospitalization, greater rehabilitation use, worse discharge disability, higher 30-day readmission, and higher cumulative post-discharge mortality. In multivariable analyses adjusted for age, sex, NIHSS, premorbid mRS, and reperfusion therapy, each 0.1-unit increase in eFI was associated with mortality beyond 90 days after discharge (adjusted HR, 1.47; 95% CI, 1.19?1.81), 30-day readmission (adjusted OR, 1.91; 95% CI, 1.43?2.59), longer hospital stay (?, 2.8 days; 95% CI, 1.4?4.2), and discharge to inpatient rehabilitation rather than home (adjusted RRR, 1.66; 95% CI, 1.27?2.16). Conclusions: In a well-documented acute stroke service supported by comprehensive longitudinal EMR data, automated multisource eFI derivation was feasible and clinically informative in AIS, capturing baseline vulnerability beyond conventional stroke measures and supporting frailty-informed risk stratification and discharge planning.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：衰弱在急性缺血性卒中（AIS）中常见且预示不良预后，但在急性卒中诊疗中尚未被常规评估。手动衰弱评估工具难以在繁忙的住院环境中一致应用，而现有的电子衰弱指数（eFI）通常依赖有限的数据模态。我们利用多源电子病历（EMR）数据开发了一种可扩展的卒中前电子衰弱指数（eFI），并评估了其临床实用性。方法：我们对2024年7月1日至2025年1月31日期间新加坡中央医院收治的AIS患者进行了回顾性队列研究。通过全自动化流程，基于3年回顾期的EMR数据推导eFI，整合了ICD-10编码、生命体征、人体测量学、实验室结果、药物及自由文本记录（采用人工智能增强提取预定义、临床可解释的缺陷）。候选变量通过验证的10步衰弱指数框架筛选，并经多学科专家共识优化。结果：在501例AIS病例中，该流程生成了75个候选变量及最终包含33个变量的eFI，成功为492例（98.2%）患者计算得分。衰弱患者表现出更高的病前残疾程度、更严重的卒中严重度、更长的住院时间、更高的康复需求、更差的出院残疾状态、更高的30天再入院率及更高的出院后累积死亡率。在多变量分析中（校正年龄、性别、NIHSS评分、病前mRS评分及再灌注治疗），eFI每增加0.1个单位与出院后90天以上死亡率（校正HR=1.47；95% CI 1.19-1.81）、30天再入院（校正OR=1.91；95% CI 1.43-2.59）、更长住院时间（β=2.8天；95% CI 1.4-4.2）及出院至住院康复而非回家（校正RRR=1.66；95% CI 1.27-2.16）显著相关。结论：在拥有全面纵向EMR数据支持的、记录完善的急性卒中服务中，自动化多源eFI推导在AIS中可行且具有临床信息价值，能够捕捉传统卒中指标之外的基线脆弱性，支持基于衰弱的风险分层和出院规划。

papers.title: Development of patient-reported outcome for spinal and bulbar muscular atrophy
papers.translated_title: 脊髓延髓肌萎缩症患者报告结局指标的开发
papers.author: Nagae, M.
papers.summary: Objectives: To develop and validate a disease-specific patient-reported outcome (PRO) measure for spinal and bulbar muscular atrophy (SBMA). Methods: A three-stage sequential design was adopted. Items were generated through qualitative interviews with patients with SBMA and expert review, refined using quantitative analyses, and evaluated for reliability and validity in independent cohorts from Japan and the United States. Results: Interviews with 12 patients generated 234 candidate items, which were refined into a final 31-item SBMAPRO comprising five domains based on an online survey of 106 patients. Internal consistency across domains ranged from Cronbach's alpha values of 0.651 to 0.901. In the Japanese cohort, test-retest reliability yielded intraclass correlation coefficients of 0.941 for physical function, 0.877 for mental health, and 0.858 for social function. Construct validity was examined through correlations with disease-specific functional measurements and the 36-Item Short Form Survey (SF-36). The SBMAPRO correlated with the SBMA Functional Rating Scale (r = -0.826, p <0.001) and with the SF-36 mental health (r = -0.693, p <0.001) and social functioning (r = -0.617, p <0.001) domains. In subscale analyses, the SBMAPRO social domain was associated with trunk-lower limb-related functional impairment (r = -0.587, p < 0.001). Similar patterns were observed in the American cohort. Conclusion: The SBMAPRO demonstrated reliability and validity in Japanese and American cohorts. Associations between mental and social domains and trunk-lower limb dysfunction suggest that mobility impairment may contribute to psychological burden and restricted social participation in SBMA, indicating that this disease-specific PRO may complement clinician-rated measures.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：开发并验证一种针对脊髓延髓肌萎缩症（SBMA）的疾病特异性患者报告结局（PRO）测量工具。方法：采用三阶段序贯设计。通过SBMA患者定性访谈和专家评审生成条目，经定量分析优化，并在日本和美国独立队列中评估其信度和效度。结果：对12名患者的访谈产生了234个候选条目，基于106名患者的在线调查，最终优化为包含五个领域的31项SBMAPRO。各领域内部一致性Cronbach's α值介于0.651至0.901之间。在日本队列中，重测信度的组内相关系数分别为：身体功能0.941、心理健康0.877、社会功能0.858。通过疾病特异性功能测量和36项简短健康调查（SF-36）检验结构效度。SBMAPRO与SBMA功能评定量表（r=-0.826，p<0.001）及SF-36心理健康（r=-0.693，p<0.001）和社会功能（r=-0.617，p<0.001）领域相关。在分量表分析中，SBMAPRO社会领域与躯干-下肢相关功能损害相关（r=-0.587，p<0.001）。美国队列中观察到相似模式。结论：SBMAPRO在日本和美国队列中展现出可靠的信度和效度。心理和社会领域与躯干-下肢功能障碍的关联提示，活动能力受损可能加剧SBMA患者的心理负担并限制其社会参与，表明该疾病特异性PRO可补充临床医生评定量表。

papers.title: Comparative Performance of Clinical Scoring Systems for Early Mortality Prediction in Blunt Traumatic Brain Injury
papers.translated_title: 钝性创伤性脑损伤早期死亡预测临床评分系统的比较性能
papers.author: Abdollahi Sarvi, M.
papers.summary: Background: Early risk stratification in traumatic brain injury (TBI) is essential for timely triage, resource allocation, and clinical decision-making within the critical first hours of admission. This study aimed to compare the predictive performance of five established clinical scoring systems includes the Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS), Revised Trauma Score (RTS), Mechanism, GCS, Age, and Arterial Pressure (MGAP) score, Modified Early Warning Score (MEWS), and Rapid Emergency Medicine Score (REMS) for early mortality prediction in patients with blunt TBI. Methods: This single-center retrospective observational cohort study evaluated 444 patients aged 18 to 89 years with blunt TBI admitted to the intensive care unit of a tertiary trauma center in Tehran, Iran, between March 2022 and March 2025. The primary outcome was early mortality, defined as death within 24 hours of admission. Discriminative performance was assessed using the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) with 95% confidence intervals (CI) derived via bootstrap resampling (1,000 iterations). Pairwise comparisons of AUCs were conducted, and optimal diagnostic cutoffs were identified using the Youden Index. Results: Within 24 hours of hospital admission, early mortality occurred in 97 patients (21.8%), while 347 patients (78.2%) survived. The trauma-specific and neurological scoring systems demonstrated the highest discriminative capacities: RTS achieved the highest accuracy (AUC = 0.676, 95% CI: 0.617-0.737), followed closely by GCS (AUC = 0.669, 95% CI: 0.608-0.727) and MGAP (AUC = 0.657, 95% CI: 0.594-0.724). General physiological scores exhibited lower performance, with MEWS achieving an AUC of 0.651 (95% CI: 0.595-0.707) and REMS demonstrating the lowest discriminative ability (AUC = 0.601, 95% CI: 0.538-0.659). Pairwise analysis confirmed that RTS GCS and MGAP significantly outperformed REMS, though no statistically significant differences were observed among RTS, GCS, and MGAP themselves. All evaluated systems demonstrated only modest overall predictive performance (AUC < 0.70). Conclusion: Trauma-specific and neurologically oriented scoring systems (RTS, GCS, and MGAP) provide superior and comparable prognostic accuracy for 24-hour mortality in blunt TBI compared to general emergency scores like REMS. However, the absolute predictive power of all evaluated models remains modest. Traditional systems relying on static admission variables fail to capture the dynamic, multifactorial nature of secondary brain injury, highlighting the critical need for multidimensional prognostic tools incorporating physiological time-series data or machine learning algorithms.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的早期风险分层对于入院后关键数小时内的及时分诊、资源分配和临床决策至关重要。本研究旨在比较五种既定临床评分系统——格拉斯哥昏迷量表（GCS）、修正创伤评分（RTS）、机制-格拉斯哥昏迷量表-年龄-动脉压（MGAP）评分、修正早期预警评分（MEWS）和快速急诊医学评分（REMS）——对钝性TBI患者早期死亡预测的性能。方法：这项单中心回顾性观察队列研究评估了2022年3月至2025年3月期间伊朗德黑兰一家三级创伤中心重症监护室收治的444名18至89岁钝性TBI患者。主要结局为早期死亡，定义为入院后24小时内死亡。判别性能通过受试者工作特征曲线下面积（AUC）及基于bootstrap重抽样（1000次迭代）的95%置信区间（CI）进行评估。进行AUC的成对比较，并通过约登指数确定最佳诊断截断值。结果：入院后24小时内，97名患者（21.8%）发生早期死亡，347名患者（78.2%）存活。创伤特异性和神经学评分系统显示出最高的判别能力：RTS准确度最高（AUC=0.676，95% CI：0.617-0.737），紧随其后的是GCS（AUC=0.669，95% CI：0.608-0.727）和MGAP（AUC=0.657，95% CI：0.594-0.724）。一般生理学评分表现较低，MEWS的AUC为0.651（95% CI：0.595-0.707），REMS的判别能力最低（AUC=0.601，95% CI：0.538-0.659）。成对分析证实RTS、GCS和MGAP显著优于REMS，但RTS、GCS和MGAP之间未观察到统计学显著差异。所有评估系统均仅显示出中等水平的整体预测性能（AUC<0.70）。结论：与REMS等一般急诊评分相比，创伤特异性和神经学导向的评分系统（RTS、GCS和MGAP）对钝性TBI的24小时死亡率提供了更优且相当的预后准确性。然而，所有评估模型的绝对预测能力仍属中等。依赖静态入院变量的传统系统无法捕捉继发性脑损伤的动态多因素特性，这凸显了对整合生理时间序列数据或机器学习算法的多维预后工具的迫切需求。
